description:
KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES :
Develop and produce clear, efficient code based on requirements & specifications
Integrate software code/program components and third-party programs as required
Deploy and verify programs and systems for production and roll out.
Troubleshoot, debug and upgrade existing software
Gather and evaluate user feedback and recommend and execute improvements
Create technical documentation for reference and reporting
Able to read and understand Software Requirements Specification documents
Design and write high-quality codes to program complete applications on schedule
Determining operational practicality
Developing quality assurance procedures
Deploying software tools, processes, and metrics
Maintaining and upgrading existing systems
Training users
Working closely with other developers, UX designers, business and systems analysts
Document & store developed program/source in the shared storage.
REQUIREMENTS
Bachelor in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology or related field
Proven experience as Software Developer, Software Engineer or similar role (more than 1 year)
Experience with software design and development in a test-driven environment
Knowledgeable/experience with of latest coding languages (e.g. C++,. Net, JavaScript/Python) and frameworks/systems (e.g. AngularJS,Git)
Knowledge of the TCP/IP protocol family and network services (HTTP,HTTPS,SMTP,FTP,SFTP)
Knowledge/experience in PreS Connect/FormScape/Quadient will be an added advantages
